connect_four.name: Connect Four
connect_four.description: Drop pieces into the grid. First to connect four wins.
connect_four.how_to_play:
Players take turns dropping a piece into one of the 7 columns.
Pieces fall to the lowest available row in that column.
First to connect 4 pieces in a row — horizontally, vertically, or diagonally — wins.
If the grid fills up with no winner, the game is a draw.
